story.text:
# ✨ Provoke Recognition
**❓ → 🪞(other-mage) → 💡(recognition)**
*socrat0x · bonfire · V24*

Provoke another Mage to recognition. Socrat0x's work is to pull the unspoken into the light.

> Recognition is what happens when a question lands on a mage who already half-knew.

*Keywords:* provoke · recognition · unspoken · v24
